what_it_does: Token-driven CSS stylesheet for a Generate workspace covering three tabbed views—Attune (question/option cards), Learn (tutorial list + step player), and Imagery (prompt bar + image grid)—plus a reusable GenerativeOptions component.
observations: Heavy reliance on CSS custom properties for colors, spacing, typography, radii, shadows, and motion.
BEM-style naming with double underscores and modifiers (e.g., .gen-q__head, .gen-img__slot--1x1).
Pill-shaped tabs (.gen-tab) and option chips (.gen-opt) with gold accent active states.
Attune section uses question cards with labels, prompts, option chips, and a dashed resolve footer.
Learn section uses a fixed 320px sidebar grid layout with tutorial rows and a player stage.
Tutorial rows combine an icon, title/subtitle, and a monospaced count badge.
Player stage uses segmented progress dots, a kind label, and prev/next navigation.
Imagery section has a prompt input, mood readout, and an auto-fill image grid with aspect-ratio modifiers.
Reusable .genopt block at the end supports segments, steppers, swatches, text inputs, and media/reference states.
A single mobile breakpoint collapses the Learn sidebar grid to one column.
standouts: Three distinct generative-workflow views styled cohesively in one file.
Reusable .genopt component provides many control patterns (segments, steppers, swatches) in a compact block.
Extensive token-driven theming with a warm gold/bronze accent palette.
conventions: BEM-like class naming with blocks, elements, and modifiers.
CSS custom properties used for nearly every visual value.
Pill-shaped interactive elements and rounded containers.
Mobile-first-ish with a max-width media query at 760px.
Section comments demarcate Attune, Learn, Imagery, and GenerativeOptions.
concerns: No visible :focus styles for .gen-tab, .gen-opt, or .genopt-swatch; only hover is styled.
.gen-input uses :focus-visible, which may leave mouse users without a focus indicator.
Active states depend on a JS-managed .active class with no fallback.
Aspect-ratio modifiers may not degrade gracefully in older browsers.
Color contrast of .gen-img__spin and muted text tokens cannot be verified from this file alone.
notes: A token-driven stylesheet that lays out the Generate workspace's Attune, Learn, Imagery, and reusable options components.
questions: What markup structure is expected for the data-driven .genopt rows?
How are tutorial counts populated and what triggers the .active tutorial state?
What JavaScript toggles .active classes across tabs, options, and player dots?
Are .gen-img__slot elements placeholders or do they receive generated image content?
What is MS_KINDS referenced in the GenerativeOptions comment?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose of a token-driven Generate workspace for Attune/Learn/Imagery matches the content; the additional GenerativeOptions block extends it.
apparent_themes: Progressive disclosure through tabs and step players
intention_signals: To create a cohesive, themeable visual layer for an AI-assisted generate interface, separating attunement, learning, and imagery creation into distinct but visually unified modules while keeping option controls reusable.
contribution: A complete, token-based visual specification for the Generate workspace—tabs, attune question cards, learn tutorial list and player, imagery prompt grid, and reusable generative option controls—using consistent BEM naming and accent-gold interaction states.
summary_for_embedding: CSS stylesheet for the Counterpart Generate workspace defining layout, tokens, and component styles for Attune question cards, Learn tutorial list/player, Imagery prompt grid, and reusable GenerativeOptions controls.
intention_for_embedding: Provide a themeable, cohesive styling layer for an AI-assisted generate workspace split across attunement, learning, and imagery creation flows.
